title: qualea dichotoma
intro: Qualea dichotoma, also known as the Quina-Quina tree, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Qualea dichotoma include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Qualea dichotoma include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
